summary: Ensure date-window exports fetch every planned backfill chunk, paginate each chunk, preserve full-day upper bounds, avoid partial output files, and keep dry-runs file-free.
reason: Multi-month Restaurant365 date exports must not silently stop after the first generated chunk or first OData page, and failed or dry-run exports must not leave misleading generated files in the publish tree.
validated_outcome: Focused Go regression tests covered multi-chunk export filters, page-by-page export, nanosecond end-of-day bounds, failed-write cleanup, and dry-run export behavior.
